allow: PowerShell(foreach \($p in 5000,5001,7000\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$p/swagger/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "port $p -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "port $p -> ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($steps = @\('/api/setup/roles/predefined','/api/setup/permissions/predefined','/api/setup/role-permissions/predefined','/api/setup/users/admin/firstuser','/api/setup/users/admin','/api/setup/users/manager','/api/setup/users/customer-support','/api/setup/users/customer','/api/setup/users/chemist'\); foreach \($s in $steps\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000$s" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "$s -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$s -> ERR $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"mobileNumber":"8793583675","password":"Admin@123","stayLoggedIn":false}' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output \("KEYS: " + \(\($j.PSObject.Properties.Name\) -join ','\)\); Write-Output \("success=" + $j.success + " role=" + $j.role + " hasToken=" + [bool]$j.token\) } catch { Write-Output "ERR $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\): $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"mobileNumber":"6666666666","password":"Customer@123","stayLoggedIn":false}' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "STATUS $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) BODY $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Net.Http; $c = New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClient; $content = New-Object System.Net.Http.StringContent\('{"mobileNumber":"6666666666","password":"Customer@123","stayLoggedIn":false}', [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8, "application/json"\); $resp = $c.PostAsync\("http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login", $content\).Result; Write-Output \("STATUS " + [int]$resp.StatusCode\); Write-Output \("BODY " + $resp.Content.ReadAsStringAsync\(\).Result\))

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/swagger/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "API UP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "API DOWN $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['token']; import os; open\('/tmp/admt','w'\).write\(t\)")

PowerShell($env:Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'flutter|dart|Flutter' }; Write-Output "---PATH SCAN DONE---"; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\","J:\\" -Filter "flutter.bat" -Recurse -Depth 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -File | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName)

Bash(python -c "import pypdf; r=pypdf.PdfReader\(r'C:\\Users\\Admin\\Downloads\\Razorpay Route Marketplace Integration Wireframe.pdf'\); print\('PAGES',len\(r.pages\)\); [print\('==== PAGE',i+1,'====\\n', p.extract_text\(\)\) for i,p in enumerate\(r.pages\)]")

Bash(python -c "import pypdf,io; r=pypdf.PdfReader\(r'C:\\Users\\Admin\\Downloads\\Razorpay Route Marketplace Integration Wireframe.pdf'\); open\(r'C:\\Users\\Admin\\Downloads\\_route_wireframe.txt','w',encoding='utf-8'\).write\('\\n'.join\('==== PAGE %d ====\\n%s'%\(i+1,p.extract_text\(\)\) for i,p in enumerate\(r.pages\)\)\)")
